title: Binary Search Tree Operations Flow
description: A flowchart demonstrating the core algorithmic processes for insertion, searching, finding min/max values, and counting nodes in a Binary Search Tree.
relationships: Start node initiates process which flows to comparison logic
Comparison logic directs flow to left or right child based on value
Insertion occurs after finding a null pointer
Min value found by traversing left until null
Max value found by traversing right until null
Node count increments recursively for each node visited
